text: 17. CLEANUP: Subcontractor acknowledges that the execution of his work will result in an indeterminate amount of debris, waste and trash, and Subcontractor agrees to retrieve, pick up and remove from the job site all such debris, waste and trash, during the course of his work and on final completion of his work. Disposal of debris, waste and trash shall be done on a day-to-day basis as is determined necessary by Contractor. If after 24 hours' notice by Contractor's representative to Subcontractor's representative at the job site, Subcontractor has not diligently proceeded with the cleanup as outlined in this paragraph, then the Contractor has the right to proceed with the cleanup work with his own labor at Subcontractor's expense. Subcontractor shall provide regular cleanup at the Project Superintendent's request.
